name: Monkey.D.Luffy (Reprint)
effect_text: If you have 3 or more Characters, your Characters with a cost of 3 or less other than [Monkey.D.Luffy] cannot be K.O.'d by your opponent's effects.DISCLAIMER: This card is a reprint of the pre-existing card in the OP07 set. The main difference between this card and the original print is the inclusion of "EN" on the right side, by the copyright information.
